solutions.solution: According to the question, Subhi > Vishal > Aakash, Deepak > Yaksh > Aakash, Deepak > Subhi. On arranging the above data, we get (Deepak) > Subhi > Vishal > Yaksh > Aakash. Clearly, Deepak is the eldest.

According to the question, Rajv > Sunil > Abhinav, Abhinav > Jayesh, Rajv > Kashi > Sunil. On arranging the above data, we get (Rajv) > Kashi > Sunil > Abhinav > Jayesh. Clearly, Rajv is the heaviest.

According to the question, Vikash > Keshav, Aashu > Shiv > Keshav, Shiv > Vikash. On arranging the above data, we get ∴ (Aashu) > Shiv > Vikash > Keshav. Clearly, Aashu is the most competent in the group.
